title: Top M.Sc Agriculture (Agronomy) Colleges in Noida, Delhi NCR
content: M.Sc. (Ag.) Agronomy is a two-year postgraduate programme that gives in-depth knowledge of agriculture and various aspects of it in specialized field. The students will have scientific knowledge and understanding of production methodology for agricultural crops. Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit. 01 Get the in-depth knowledge of agricultural principles required for the implementation and ongoing advancement of agricultural technologies. 02 Demonstrate an analytical and inquisitive approach for development and advancement of agriculture 03 01 Employ agricultural science expertise to the resolution of farming-related problems. 02 Have knowledge and aptitude for problem-solving and critical thinking towards agricultural production 03 Develop and use the most appropriate crop production methods, resources, and IT tools while being aware of their constraints. 04 Assess societal, health, safety, legal, and cultural issues, as well as the resulting duties, in relation to the professional practice of agriculture. 05 Recognize the effects of expert agricultural solutions in the context of society and the environment for sustainable development. 06 Develop into tenacious individuals who challenge, practice, and use the knowledge gained to develop solutions to problems in agricultural production. 07 Effectively perform on a personal level, as a team player or leader in a varied agribusiness organization, and in multidisciplinary situations. 08 Incorporate moral principles to teaching and research in the various agricultural science fields. 01 Get the in-depth knowledge of agricultural principles required for the implementation and ongoing advancement of agricultural technologies. 02 Demonstrate an analytical and inquisitive approach for development and advancement of agriculture. 03 01 To demonstrate written and oral communication. 02 To understand basic concept of crop production technologies. 03 To collect data, analyze data in solving problems of farmers by conducting applied research in agronomy. 04 Apply their research expertise in recommending good agriculture practices for enhancing production and income of the farming communities. Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit.
